dublinCore.dc:title: 119 SJ 113 IS: Providing congressional disapproval under chapter 8 of title 5, United States Code, of the rule submitted by the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency relating to “Rescission of Principles for Climate-Related Financial Risk Management for Large Financial Institutions”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Warren (for herself and Mr. Whitehouse) introduced the following joint resolution; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs

form.official-title: Providing congressional disapproval under chapter 8 of title 5, United States Code, of the rule submitted by the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency relating to Rescission of Principles for Climate-Related Financial Risk Management for Large Financial Institutions.

section.text: That Congress disapproves the rule submitted by the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency relating to Rescission of Principles for Climate-Related Financial Risk Management for Large Financial Institutions (90 Fed. Reg. 51756 (November 18, 2025)), and such rule shall have no force or effect.
